/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 4 Y:PJ 1 Y /CTS: 110 /X:BALANCE OF TIME TO BE SERVED IN LIVE-IN RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/DNA/WS/VF4:200/11590/DTC/RX/LF/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/PFIA:500/CTORD:RELEASE OF DEFENDANT'S CELLPHONE TO FRIEND TIFFANY BARNETT - ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE/ /OBEY/ACCEP/
